# Transcrição: 17. Call the Wrong Extension

- **Fonte:** 17. Call the Wrong Extension
- **Duração:** 00:50
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 00:50]

You can't get through the client? Try this. Call the wrong extension. You know he's at 401. Don't call 401. Call 400 and ask for the contact. Hey is John in? Now this isn't John's extension. Oh I must have got the wrong extension. Do you mind connecting me or transferring me to his extension? Boom! You're in. Now this is sneaky. It feels a little deceptive. I never feel too good about it when I do it. Look I'm gonna do whatever it takes. I have a great product, a great service, a great company, a great brand. I can't get back in front of the person. Shard of me stalking him home or stalking him to his office. I have to figure out creative ways to get in front of this client. If you believe in your product, your service, your company, the way I do mine, then try this. Try the wrong extension phone call as a way to get in front of your client.
